creator: girgen@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!

The correct username is postgres since some time back. I'm not exactly sure how come you ended up with a package expectiing the old username, pgsql. To answer I would need more logs of what happened at the installation phase. I guess this is not possible due to it beeing so long ago.
I will close this PR since was a long time ago, and it does work if the ports tree is up to date. Please open the PR again if the problem still persists.

Best regards,
Palle
